gist.headline: Grok gets the picture
gist.blurb: We've wired up image-to-video support for grok-video-pro. Hand it a starting frame, add a prompt, and watch your static pixels spring to life.
gist.summary: Updated the grok-video-pro model integration to accept image inputs, enabling image-to-video generation via the xAI API.
gist.impact: Users can now provide an initial image URL alongside their text prompts to guide video generation with grok-video-pro.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee handing a static picture (a painted canvas or polaroid) to the Monitor Robot. The Robot's screen shows that same picture coming to life with motion/video elements. Represents taking a static image and turning it into video.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a small painted polaroid to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot's screen glows with a moving, animated version of the picture. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
